predictions.evidence: The mass spectrometry proteomics data have been deposited to the ProteomeXchange Consortium via the PRIDE partner repository with the dataset identifier PXD047284 and 10.6019/PXD047284
The raw sequencing data are deposited in the European Genome-Phenome Archive under accession no. EGAS50000000169.
Raw sequencing data generated as part of this manuscript are deposited in dbGap (https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/gap/) under accession number phs003416.v1.p1.
Sequencing data from cell lines are deposited in GEO (https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/) with accession number GSE241673.
The MS proteomics data have been deposited to the ProteomeXchange Consortium via the PRIDE partner repository with the dataset identifier PXD042991.

The PIMMS package and all analysis scripts are available on PyPI and at github.com/RasmussenLab/pimms. The differential analysis and machine learning procedure used on the ALD data is available on PyPI and GitHub at github.com/RasmussenLab/njab.
The mass spectrometry proteomics data have been deposited to the PRIDE Archive (http://www.ebi.ac.uk/pride/archive/) via the PRIDE partner repository with the data set identifier PXD053567.
Global proteomics spectra and associated were deposited to the ProteomeXchange Consortium (https://www.proteomexchange.org/) via the PRIDE partner repository with the dataset identifier PXD052949.
The MS/MS raw data and analysis have been deposited in the ProteomeXchange Consortium via the jPOST partner repository with the data set identifier JPST002506 and PXD049309
The MS/MS raw data and analysis have been deposited in the ProteomeXchange Consortium via the jPOST partner repository with the data set identifier JPST002506 and PXD049309
All data and search results have been deposited to the iProX database (iProX: IPX0004230000), which are publicly accessible at http://www.iprox.org.
Proteomics data can be found at the MassIVE database via MSV000092944.
RNASeq data has been deposited into GEO under accession GSE60052
WES data was deposited into dBGaP under accession ID phs001083.v1.p1
Binary sequence alignment data of 300bp regions around all identified somatic mutations and SNP array data were deposited in the European Genome-Phenome Archive (EGA; EGAS00001000299).
All raw data resulting from RNA-seq, whole exome sequencing, and targeted sequencing is available from the database of Genotypes and Phenotypes (dbGaP) under accession number phs001249.v1.p1.
All NGS files are available from dbGaP under accession, phs001366.v1.p1 (https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/projects/gap/cgi-bin/study.cgi?study_id=phs001366.v1.p1).
Data has been deposited in dbGAP with accession #PHS001049 (https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/gap/?term=PHS001049)
and SRA with project accession PRJNA306801 (https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/bioproject/?term=PRJNA306801)
Single-cell RNA-seq and MIBI data are available through the HTAN Data Portal https://data.humantumoratlas.org/ under accession GSE131907.
MSK-IMPACT sequencing data are available under dbGaP accession phs001713.

The mass spectrometry proteomics data has been deposited to the ProteomeXchange Consortium via the PRIDE partner repository with the dataset identifiers PXD029805 and 10.6019/PXD029805 (cell pellet data)
